title: Plan and implement permaculture works
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and implement permaculture works demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for permaculture works

pcs.text: Confirm and verify client preferences and contract requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm and verify client preferences and contract requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm and verify client preferences and contract requirements.

pcs.text: Verify scope of works in permaculture works plan with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify scope of works in permaculture works plan with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify scope of works in permaculture works plan with client.

pcs.text: Verify statutory obligations and permits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify statutory obligations and permits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify statutory obligations and permits.

pcs.text: Conduct site visit to confirm details of permaculture works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct site visit to confirm details of permaculture works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct site visit to confirm details of permaculture works.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards associated with the permaculture works and develop site safety plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards associated with the permaculture works and develop site safety plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards associated with the permaculture works and develop site safety plan.

pcs.text: Verify availability, quantity and costs of plants and materials specified in works plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify availability, quantity and costs of plants and materials specified in works plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify availability, quantity and costs of plants and materials specified in works plan.

pcs.text: Verify resources, tools and equipment required for permaculture works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify resources, tools and equipment required for permaculture works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify resources, tools and equipment required for permaculture works.

pcs.text: Confirm availability of resources, tools and equipment with suppliers and contractors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm availability of resources, tools and equipment with suppliers and contractors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm availability of resources, tools and equipment with suppliers and contractors.

pcs.text: Verify site access and establishment procedures according to works and environmental management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify site access and establishment procedures according to works and environmental management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify site access and establishment procedures according to works and environmental management plan.
